parsed_review.summary: CP00-814 (RP26.P07.M05.S11-S20, risk A, 10 units, micro "Permission And Audit Binding") is a clean descriptor-only tail continuation of CP00-813 and its descriptor-verified production_ready claim is well-supported. Verification (read-only via Read/Grep/Glob): (1) ENTERPRISE_SAAS_CP814_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:494) matches manifest/baseline/contract (pack_id, risk A, 10 units, range S11-S20, upstream CP00-813, next CP00-815/S21). (2) ENTERPRISE_SAAS_CP814_REQUIREMENTS uses FAILURE_RECOVERY_ROWS.slice(10,20); the 10 tail titles exactly match the manifest included-unit titles in order, and deliverable_counts (failure_recovery:3, implementation:1, hermes_evidence:2, fixture:1, test:2, security_audit:1=10) match the prompt distribution. (3) No-write/no-real-data is enforced at multiple layers: createCaseSet (service.js:304) hard-codes descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false and all payload flags false; ROW_EXTRAS add only further false guards; validators.js rejects any runtime/leak/permission-eval/audit-write/secret/cross-tenant flag; NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION and the materialized contract rows confirm. (4) authority_boundary sets claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; claude_packet is read_only. (5) Hermes is used only for a descriptor-only evidence packet (receipt_shape descriptor_only_enterprise_saas_no_write, emits_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. (6) model.test.js (1132-1200) asserts coverage, runtime-closed tail rows, authority boundary, contract promotion to CP00-814 with prior packs historical; contract validation.valid=true; validate-rp26 script bound to CP814 with manifest-snapshot fallback; live plan cursor next_subphase=RP26.P07.M05.S11 confirms CP00-814 is the current pack. (7) Review-evidence hardening satisfied: auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1436-byte valid-JSON stdout), no prior malformed review receipts; runtime_ready=false (no runtime/enterprise-trust overclaim). Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer, not final approver; that human/enterprise-trust authority boundary is expected and outside this receipt, so it does not block this CP closeout goal. Pre-closeout absence of command-evidence.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, and claude-review-result.json is expected (generated at/after this review). Unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook/docx docs) are correctly preserved outside scope (active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty). No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
